title: Codex 推出浏览器开发者模式
full_text:
OpenAI Developers on X: "Introducing developer mode for browser use in Chrome and the Codex in-app browser.
Codex can use the Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) to debug browser issues by profiling JavaScript performance and inspecting console output, network traffic, and page state. https://t.co/JTFjgCHmgI" / X
